name: Hermosa Oval Acacia Wood 70" Dining Table - Gray - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Enjoy this stylish outdoor acacia wood table, prefect for any patio set up. Feature a beautiful teak finish, this oval table is a wonderful addition. The smooth lines of the legs give the table a calm, stylish look that complements the perpendicular wooden slats featured on the table top.
Some assembly required.
